name: @aikdna/open_source_project
description: Open-source project judgment — diagnose why a project is not gaining adoption. The root cause is usually value-entry clarity, not documentation or feature gaps.
core_insight: Adoption failure is a value-entry problem: visitors cannot determine in 30 seconds what problem this solves and why it is better.

not_for: guaranteed growth or community strategy prediction
requires_human_review_when: recommendations will change public project positioning or README claims
the project serves a regulated, security-critical, or deeply technical audience
the maintainer has explicit goals other than adoption
known_failure_modes: over-applying adoption framing to personal or research projects
undervaluing deep technical documentation for expert-only audiences
mistaking low adoption for poor value-entry when distribution is the real bottleneck
